desc:
This path marks the beginning of the long road to the southern
part of the world.  There are several rumors as to where it leads,
but no one knows for sure.  Looking south, you gaze into a panorama
of a rocky, cactus-dotted land, shimmering in the heat of the day.

exits.desc: A huge cactus-dotted desert spreads out before you.

extra_descs.desc:
Southern Desert by  Ian Smith/Freak, Dark Master of Thieves
Builder      : Freak
Zone         : 269 Souther Desert
Began        : 12/30/95
Player Level : 17-20
Rooms        : 68
Mobiles      : 13
Objects      : 10
Triggers     : 1
Links        : 00, 24, 15

name: The Beginning Of The Southern Desert

desc:
Scrub brush and cacti of many sorts are beginning to
appear, you are thankful that they do not grow on the path.
To the south, you see a desert, teeming with desert life.

exits.desc: The heat makes the desert to the south shimmer.

name: The Beginning Of The Southern Desert

desc:
Heat waves make the world shimmer, as you trod through
what feels like an oven. Plants of all sorts cling to the dry
ground here, barely surviving the dry heat. The only
sound is the low whisper of hot wind, and the small
rustling of rodents fleeing from your presence.

exits.desc: Far to the south you can barely make out a large rock of some sort.

name: The Southern Desert

desc:
To the south you can barely see a huge, low, mesa, sitting
solidly as it has been from the beginning of time. Looking
northward brings no rewards, it just hurts your eyes.

exits.desc: There is a mesa near to the south.

name: Near A Large Mesa

desc:
The small footpath you have been following splits here;
one part leading off to the east where it disappears into the
sagebrush. To the south the path continues, getting
more and more overgrown as it goes.  Near to the south
the northern edge of the large mesa looms up, a black wall
against the sky.

exits.desc: The path lead off to the north.
The path forks off to the east, where it disappears into the brush.
A large mesa looms up in the south.

name: A Fork In The Path

desc:
The footpath here leads east and west, nearly choked in parts
with sagebrush anc cacti. Up ahead you see...can it be true?
is that a Taco Bell you see?

exits.desc: You see a shimmering image to the east.
A fork in the path lies to the west.

name: A Choked Footpath

desc:
Nearly delirious from the heat and thirst, you totter up to the front steps
of the Taco Bell.  (or is it Taco Hell?  ) Stumbling through the weeds, you
suddenly realize that this is all some deadly trick of the desert.  The mirage
quivers, and disappears before your bloodshot eyes.  The path here leads east
and west.

exits.desc: The path look like it disappears to the east.
You have no desire to see the cacti to the west.

name: The Mirage

desc:
The small path you have been carefully following turns to the
south, and runs off to the west.  The sage here now begins to irritate
you, as it is spreading little burrs under your clothing. You are now
hoping that soon one of the oasis you see will be real.

exits.desc: You rub your eyes and try to make out the split in the path to the south.
The west doesn't seem as glorious as it does in all those old movies.

name: A Curve In The Path

desc:
To the south a great, impassable rock wall looms high above
you. It seems to sneer at you, puny compared to its enormous
size. a small footpath leads north from here.

exits.desc: The side of the mesa is impossible to climb.

name: The Large Mesa

desc:
The path splits here, one part leading off to the east and
the other continuing to the south. Scanning the horizon, you see
nothing but dry, dull, weeds, and the occasional stately Saguaro
cactus.  You wonder how the world got to be so darn ugly.

exits.desc: A boring path leads northwards, perhaps to some famous land.
A path leads off into desert mountains.
Your eyes hurt, due to the continuous desert scene.

name: Another Split In The Path

desc:
Here you stand in the foothills of the mountains to the
east. The vegetation dies around you, as the insects sing their
lonesome song.

exits.desc: To the east the mountains begin to rise, as your spirits fall.
To the west you see a dreary little fork in the weed-choked path.

name: Lonely Desert Mountains

desc:
Here the ground has risen up, forcing you to exert yourself
harder. Those precious movement points slip away as you trod
over the now rocky road. Stray critters scamper about, praying
to their critter gods that you will quickly leave the area.
   The road here curves to the south.

exits.desc: You see more of the mountainous road.
The rocky path leads west.

name: The Desert Mountains

desc:
Here the desert forbids your life to get any easier, and
you are forced to exert yourself to travel uphill.  Cursing
mother nature, you ignore your thirst and plod onward.
   To the south the mountains rise up out of the earth like
an ill specter.

exits.desc: To the north you look down onto flatter ground.
You are displeased with the thought of travelling uphill.

name: The Desert Foothills

desc:
Here you really have to be careful as you travel. The number
of rocks and dust particles in the path seems to rise with
the number of steps you take.  A trail leads off to the east,
and the path continues south.

exits.desc: You see a dangerous road, almost unfit for travel.
You see an overgrown trail, complete with fallen rocks.
To the south the road leads through the mountains.

name: A Fork In The Rocky Road

desc:
Here you stop, and gaze of into the panoramic view to the east.
The path here has ceased to exist, due to the severe drop down to
the rest of the desert far below you. Off in the distance you see
a huge landmark, that looks strikingly similar to an enormous
crater.

exits.desc: You gaze upon the Southern desert.
You look back to the desert mountains.

name: The Disappearing Path

desc: You grow weary as you trod through these dry mountains.

exits.desc: You see a bend up ahead.

name: The Desert Mountains

desc:
With the worst of the mountains to the north, the trail here
becomes easier. Far off to the east you think you see blue.
to the south the dusty road continues.

exits.desc: The road leads north into the Southern Desert.
The road to the south ends in a 'T'.

name: The Foothills

desc:
Here the road bends, on end leads north and the other leads east.
You are surrounded by sage brush, and heat. You can barely make out
a path to the south.

exits.desc: The path leads north into the heart of the desert mountains.
The path leads east, where it turns into a road.

name: A Bend In The Fading Road

desc:
Here the land is harsh and hot, reminding you of your
4th-grade teacher.

exits.desc: You see a 'T' in the road to the east.
The road fades into a path to the west.

name: A Dusty Road

desc:
The dusty road here splits to the east and to the west. The
desert continues to the south.

exits.desc: The road leads north into the desert.
Off to the west you see more desert.

name: A Dusty 'T' Intersection

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon. You can barely see mountains on the east
horizon.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.  You can barely see mountains on the east
horizon.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.  The mountains to the east are snow-capped,
and rocky.

exits.desc: You see mountains to the east.
You see the Southern desert to the west.

name: The Southern Desert

desc: The desert stretches out in every direction but east.

exits.desc: The Southern desert stretches out to the western horizon.

name: The Southern Desert

desc:
You are walking down a trail, overgrown with cactus and other dry
plants.

exits.desc: You see a more-travelled path to the north.
You see more desert to the south.

name: An Overgrown Trail

desc:
Here the air is as dry as your step-mother's humor.
(Thank God she's not here to watch you mud.)
name: Way Out In The Southern Desert

desc:
You are walking down a trail, overgrown with cactus and other dry
plants.
A path leads east from here, off into the distance.

exits.desc: A small footpath runs east.

name: An Overgrown Trail

desc:
The heat is wearing on you, as you stumble along here.
The trail leads south, east, and west with no obvious intent
or purpose.
name: A Faded Footpath

desc:
You have travelled out so far now that you have almost forgotten
what water looks and tastes like.
name: Way Out In The Desert

desc:
You are nowhere near where everyone else wants to be.
How do you feel about that?

exits.desc: You see the trail here leads north.

name: Way Out In The Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.  Far off to the south-west you can
barely see a mesa, sitting on the horizon.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.  Off to the south you can
see a mesa, rising up from the horizon.

exits.desc: A rocky mesa lies to the south.

name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.  Off to the south-west you can
see a mesa, sitting on the horizon.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.  A way off to the south-west you can
just see a mesa, sitting on the horizon.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.  Quite a way off to the south-west you can
just see a mesa, sitting on the horizon.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.  Far off to the south-west you can
barely see a mesa, sitting on the horizon.
name: The Southern Desert

desc: The desert stretches out in every direction.

exits.desc: You see more desert to the north.
The trail wanders off to the east.
You see more desert to the south.
The trail wanders of into the west.

name: Way Out In The Southern Desert

desc: The desert stretches out in every direction.

exits.desc: You see more desert to the north.

name: Way Out In The Southern Desert

desc: The desert stretches out in every direction.

exits.desc: You see more desert to the north.

name: Way Out In The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, a rugged terrain
reminding you of the moon.  To the south the mesa looms nearer,
you think you can hear strange singing blowing in the wind.

exits.desc: The mesa to the south ominously begins to blot out the sky.

name: Near A Rocky Mesa

desc: The desert stretches out in every direction.

exits.desc: You see more desert to the north.
The trail continues to the south, through the desert weeds.

name: Way Out In The Southern Desert

desc:
Here the going becomes more rugged, as outcroppings of rock
jut up through the desert floor.
   The mesa to the south seems ominously silent...

exits.desc: To the north you see the desert.
You begin to fear the mesa to the south...

name: North Of A Rocky Mesa

desc: The desert stretches out in every direction.

exits.desc: You see more desert to the north.
You might be able to walk east through the brush...

name: Way Out In The Southern Desert

desc:
You are completely surrounded by tumbleweeds now, and
the world is deathly silent.

exits.desc: You see more brush to the north.
You see more brush to the east.
You see more brush to the south.
You see more brush to the west.

name: In The Brush

desc:
Here you decide not to go any further, due to the increasing
number of brambles getting caught in your clothes.

exits.desc: You see more brush to the north.
You see more brush to the east.
You see more brush to the south.
You see more brush to the west.

name: In The Brush

desc:
You have finally reached the mesa. The rocky formation reached up
to about the height of 200 feet, there is no way you could ever climb
it. Directly to the south you spot a small hole.

exits.desc: You see a small hole, partially covered by a big rock.

extra_descs.desc: It looks as if it is movable...

name: The Mesa

desc: This is the largest desert you have ever seen...
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The path has disappeared completely, leaving you free to
choose any direction at all.

exits.desc: This is the largest desert you have ever seen...
This is the largest desert you have ever seen...
This is the largest desert you have ever seen...
This is the largest desert you have ever seen...

name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The small trail you have been painstakingly following
leads to the north and south, and a smaller trail wanders to the west.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The small trail you have been painstakingly following
leads to the north and south, with no end in sight.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
You wander between large cacti and jagged rocks, trying to
stay away from all the pricks.
The trail leads east and south from here.

exits.desc: You see a desert path, deserted.
the path leads south.

name: Cactus Land

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, and a faint trail
runs off to the west.

exits.desc: A small trail goes west from here.

name: The Southern Desert

desc:
You wander between large cacti and jagged rocks, trying to
stay away from all the pricks.
The trail leads north and south from here.
name: A Cactus-Infested Area

desc:
You wander between large cacti and jagged rocks, trying to
stay away from all those darn pricks.
The trail leads north and east from here.
name: A Cactus-Infested Area

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, and a faint trail
runs off to the west. The main path leads north and south.

exits.desc: You can go east from here.
A small trail goes west from here.

name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The sage brush and tumbleweeds here press in all around you,
making it a bit hard to walk.

exits.desc: The 'main' path lies west.

name: In The Brush

desc:
The sage brush and tumbleweeds here press in all around you,
making it a bit hard to walk.
name: In The Brush

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, and the main
path leads north and south.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, and the main
path leads north and south.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, and the main
path leads north and south.
name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, and the main
path leads north and east.

exits.desc: The path disappears to the east.

name: The Southern Desert

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, and the main
path leads east; westward it begins to diminish....

exits.desc: You can't see far into the silent brush to the east...

name: A Brush-Filled Trail

desc:
The desert stretches out in every direction, and you can no
longer make out a path.

exits.desc: You see the desert...
You see the desert...
You see the desert...
You see the desert...

name: A Brush-Filled Trail

desc:
The trail here is clearing a little, you carefully notice
broken twigs and brush-marks on the desert floor.

exits.desc: You see the desert...
A small clearing lies to the east.
You see the desert...
You see more brush to the west.

name: A Clearer Trail

desc:
You have arrived at what seems to be the uttermost southern
point of the Earth.  to the east there is what seems to you to be a
large Indian-style dwelling of some sort, made of a dark quartz-like
stone.
About half way up it you can see the outlines of a sealed door.
   Looking about, you wonder why you begin to
hear noises...

exits.desc: You see the front end of a stone wigwam of some sort.
You see Brush to the west.

extra_descs.desc:
There is a slight depression in the stone dwelling to your east, making a
circle that seems to be the only entrance to it.

name: A Small Clearing

desc:
As your eyes begin to adjust, you can make out scattered bits
of bone and broken pottery strewn across the floor. To one corner
you see the remains of what looks like a campfire. Feeling
claustrophobic, you suddenly feel the urge to leave!

exits.desc: You  see a small opening.

extra_descs.desc: It looks as if it is movable...

name: A Small Cave

desc:
It is very dark in here, and you shiver despite the heat
of the desert outside.  A circle of stones lies in the dust,
looking magical in placement. the walls around you are covered
with paintings of what could be identified as scenes from the
beginning of the world.

exits.desc: You see a door to your west.

extra_descs.desc:
The paintings you see are very beautiful, and magic seems to emanate from
them.

There is a slight depression in the stone dwelling to your east, making a
circle that seems to be the only entrance to it.

name: Inside A Small Stone Dwelling
